features.name: cross-coupled always blocks with posedge same signal
features.description: Code should include two separate always blocks both triggered by posedge of the same signal, where one block assigns a value to that signal based on its current state

features.name: reg signal assigned in always block based on its own value
features.description: Code should include a reg signal that is assigned inside an always block based on its own current value, creating a data dependency

features.name: always block with posedge event control
features.description: Code should include an always block using posedge event control for synchronization
